recommendations.title: Then Came You
recommendations.overview: An American hypochondriac who is working as a baggage handler is forced to confront his fears when a British teenager with a terminal illness enlists him to help her carry out her eccentric bucket list.

recommendations.title: The Hating Game
recommendations.overview: Resolving to achieve professional success without compromising her ethics, Lucy embarks on a ruthless game of one-upmanship against cold and efficient nemesis Joshua, a rivalry that is complicated by her growing attraction to him.

recommendations.title: Which Brings Me to You
recommendations.overview: Two romantic burnouts, Jane and Will, are immediately drawn to each other at a mutual friend’s wedding. After a disastrous hookup in the coatroom, the two spend the next 24 hours together, trading candid confessions of messy histories and heartbreak,

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Do Revenge
recommendations.overview: A dethroned queen bee at a posh private high school strikes a secret deal with an unassuming new student to enact revenge on one another’s enemies.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: LOL Surprise: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Dazzling doll sisters Queen Bee and Royal Bee make their first movie with help from their fashionable friends in this one-of-a-kind magical adventure.

recommendations.title: The Basketball Diaries
recommendations.overview: A high school basketball player’s life turns upside down after free-falling into the harrowing world of drug addiction.

recommendations.title: Slaughter High
recommendations.overview: Eight different people are invited to their 10-year high school reunion at their now-closed down high school where a former student, disfigured from a prank gone wrong, is there to seek revenge.
recommendations.director: Mark Ezra, George Dugdale, Peter Mackenzie Litten

recommendations.title: Keith
